instruction:
The graphical depiction of the equation of a multiple regression model with $k$ independent variables $k>1$ is referred to as: [ANS] A. a response surface  B. a plane only when $k=3$  C. a response variable  D. a straight line
If all the points for a multiple regression model with two independent variables were on the regression plane, then the multiple coefficient of determination would equal: [ANS] A. any number between 0 and 2  B. 0  C. 1  D. 2, since there are two independent variables
